forensic_scene_selected.reason: Most legally critical scene — pedestrian visibility/sightline is core evidentiary claim. Worst human figure quality. Driver POV has no interior, which is legally misleading.
p0_issues: Pedestrian figure: disconnected primitives, 150 verts — needs 2000+ vert continuous mesh
Vehicle interior: empty box — needs dashboard/steering/A-pillars for driver POV credibility
Impact markers: cartoonish red rings — needs numbered forensic evidence tents
p1_issues: Sightline visualization: thick solid lines — needs thin dotted with distance labels
Crosswalk detail: flat white rectangles — needs textured paint with wear
Exhibit overlay: not applied — v8_exhibit_overlay.py must be wired in
p2_issues: Road surface: flat grey — apply pro_asphalt_material()
Street furniture: empty roadside — add traffic signal, crosswalk button, curb
Camera DOF: none — add per-camera f-stop
